title: Vehicle body components comprising retroreflectors and their methods of manufacture
abstract: A body component of a vehicle can comprise a first substrate formed of at least one non-conductive material and defining a back surface that defines a retroreflector geometry and a front surface that defines a different geometry than the retroreflector geometry, wherein the front surface of the first substrate is an exposed A-surface of the body component. The body component can further comprise a conductive layer formed of a conductive material and arranged adjacent to the back surface of the first layer, the conductive layer (i) also defining the retroreflector geometry and (ii) reflecting radar waves transmitted from a radar device of another vehicle.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A body component of a vehicle, the body component comprising: a radar-transparent dielectric layer defining a visible A-side and an opposing B-side; one or more retroreflectors; and one or more attachment devices for attaching the one or more retroreflectors to the B-side of the radar-transparent dielectric layer. 2. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the one or more retroreflectors comprise an array of a plurality of corner retroreflectors. 3. The body component of claim 2, wherein the plurality of corner retroreflectors are free such that they are individually attached to the B-side of the body component. 4. The body component of claim 2, wherein the plurality of corner retroreflectors are connected to each other via attachment strips or a single back piece such that they are collectively attached to the B-side of the body component. 5. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the one or more attachment devices comprise at least one of (i) clips, (ii) a dog-houses plus a fitment, (iii) adhesive tape, (iv) non-tape adhesive, and (v) sonic welding. 6. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the radar-transparent dielectric layer is one of polycarbonate (PC), acrylonitrile butadiene styrene (ABS), PC-ABS, thermoplastic olefin (TPO), a ceramic, a carbon composite, and glass. 7. The body component of claim 6, wherein the retroreflectors are formed of (i) a metal or (ii) one of PC, ABS, PC-ABS, TPO, a ceramic, a carbon composite, and glass, plus a radar-reflective coating or an integrated conductive mineral. 8. The body component of claim 1 , further comprising a radar- transparent coating disposed on the A-side of the body component. 9. The body component of claim 8, wherein the radar-transparent coating is one of (i) paint and (ii) a post-transition metal or metalloid applied via physical vapor deposition (PVD) or a film. 10. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the body component is a painted side body molding. 1 1. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the body component is a painted wheel trim. 12. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the body component is a mold-in-color (MiC) tail lamp accent. 13. The body component of claim 1 , wherein the body component is a chrome-like trunk lid finisher 14. A retroreflector system for the vehicle, the retroreflector system comprising a first four of the body components of claim 1 arranged at four corners of the vehicle to enhance a reflective pattern of the vehicle for other vehicle radar systems. 15. The retroreflector system of claim 14, further comprising a second four of the body components of claim 1 arranged at front and rear ends and opposing sides of the vehicle to further enhance the reflective pattern of the vehicle for other vehicle radar systems.
